_comment_purpose: Per-agent intent file. The LIVE settings the harness reads are composed by orchestrator/bootstrap.py into state/.openharness/settings.json (OPENHARNESS_CONFIG_DIR). OpenHarness does not auto-merge this file; only the path_rules below are consumed by the orchestrator and unioned into the composed settings.
_comment_role: Router (the-gooning-company). Reads roadmap, reads every god.md for observability, never mutates roadmap — that's product's job.
_tools_intent: Router needs the builtin agent-tool (to delegate to product/marketing/finance AgentDefinitions) plus roadmap.read_* and any router.* MCP tools. Domain tools (product.*, marketing.*, finance.*) should NOT be called directly by the router. Tool-level gating is enforced client-side via AgentDefinition.tools for teammates; the router can see all tools currently.
_model_intent: Inherits $GOONING_MODEL (default gpt-5.4) from the composed settings.json via OPENHARNESS_CONFIG_DIR.
